nuggets.headline: Pete Rango's 'Savage Planet' isn't just an album; it’s a tight, almost conceptual collaboration with one artist that defines its entire identity.
nuggets.text: Unlike many artists who feature a rotating cast of collaborators, Pete Rango made a deliberate choice for his 2022 album 'Savage Planet.' Every single one of its three tracks—'Oms at Play,' 'Traag Park,' and 'Planet X'—features the artist Xmane exclusively, cementing a unique, concentrated creative partnership for the entire project. This singular artistic vision across a short-form album creates a remarkably cohesive sonic experience.

nuggets.headline: The opening track, 'Oms at Play,' anchors Pete Rango's short 'Savage Planet' album, hinting at a maximalist ambition within a minimalist framework.
nuggets.text: At four minutes, 'Oms at Play' stands out as the longest track on Pete Rango's remarkably concise 2022 album, 'Savage Planet,' which features only three songs. This deliberate choice to make the opener the most expansive piece on such a compact project underscores its thematic importance and sets the tone for the entire EP, inviting listeners to delve deeper into its atmosphere from the very first note.

source.title: Download Pete Rango album songs: Savage Planet | Boomplay Music
source.quoteSnippet: 1 Oms at Play ft. Xmane Pete Rango 04:00... Savage Planet is a music album released in 2022. Savage Planet has 3 songs sung by Pete Rango.

nuggets.headline: If the uniquely dreamy and laid-back groove of 'Oms at Play' resonated with you, you've got to experience the effortlessly cool world of Still Woozy.
nuggets.text: Still Woozy, the moniker of Sven Gamsky, crafts tracks that share Pete Rango’s knack for blending hazy, lo-fi aesthetics with genuinely infectious melodies and a soulful, unhurried feel. His distinctive vocal delivery and psychedelic-tinged indie-pop production create a similarly immersive and atmospheric soundscape that fans of 'Oms at Play' will find instantly appealing, matching its smooth mood and intricate, yet relaxed tempo.

artistSummary: Pete Rango is an accomplished pop artist from Richmond, Virginia, renowned for his alluring fusion of pop and indie pop. His music captivates listeners with contagious melodies, thoughtful lyrics, and a distinctive sound that blends various genres while always maintaining emotional depth. Rango’s creative approach often involves focused collaborations, as exemplified by his compact 2022 album 'Savage Planet'.
